words.meaning_en: before noon
words.example_en: I always wake up early at 6:00 a.m.
words.example_ta: நான் எப்போதும் காலை 6:00 முற்பகலுக்கு சீக்கிரம் எழுந்துவிடுவேன்.

words.meaning_en: reckless freedom from inhibition or worry
words.example_en: He played the drums with complete abandon, not caring who was listening.
words.example_ta: யார் கேட்கிறார்கள் என்று கவலைப்படாமல் அவர் முழுமையான சுதந்திரத்துடன் டிரம்ஸ் வாசித்தார்.

words.meaning_en: forsaken, left behind
words.example_en: The old house at the end of the street has been abandoned for years.
words.example_ta: தெருவின் முடிவில் உள்ள பழைய வீடு பல ஆண்டுகளாக கைவிடப்பட்டுள்ளது.

words.meaning_en: markedly different from an accepted norm
words.example_en: His sudden outburst was completely aberrant from his usual calm behavior.
words.example_ta: அவரது திடீர் கோபம் அவரது வழக்கமான அமைதியான நடத்தைக்கு முற்றிலும் மாறானதாக இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: a deviation from what is normal or expected
words.example_en: The sudden snowstorm in July was a weather aberration.
words.example_ta: ஜூலை மாதத்தில் ஏற்பட்ட திடீர் பனிப்புயல் ஒரு வானிலை மாற்றமாகும்.

words.meaning_en: the quality of being able to perform; a quality that permits achievement
words.example_en: She has an incredible ability to solve complex puzzles quickly.
words.example_ta: சிக்கலான புதிர்களை விரைவாகத் தீர்க்கும் நம்பமுடியாத திறன் அவளுக்கு உள்ளது.

words.meaning_en: formally reject or give up (as a belief)
words.example_en: Under threat of torture, Galileo abjured the heliocentric theory.
words.example_ta: சித்திரவதை அச்சுறுத்தலின் கீழ், கலிலியோ சூரியனை மையமாகக் கொண்ட கோட்பாட்டை முறைப்படி கைவிட்டார்.

words.meaning_en: having the necessary means, skill, or authority to do something
words.example_en: Are you able to finish this report by Friday?
words.example_ta: வெள்ளிக்கிழமைக்குள் இந்த அறிக்கையை உங்களால் முடிக்க முடியுமா?

words.meaning_en: on the move
words.example_en: The toddler was about the house, exploring every room.
words.example_ta: குழந்தை வீடு முழுவதும் சுற்றித்திரிந்து, ஒவ்வொரு அறையையும் ஆராய்ந்தது.

words.meaning_en: an earlier section of a written text
words.example_en: As mentioned above in the document, you must sign the form.
words.example_ta: ஆவணத்தில் மேலே குறிப்பிட்டுள்ளபடி, நீங்கள் படிவத்தில் கையெழுத்திட வேண்டும்.

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'a.m.'?
meaning_mcq.answer: before noon

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abandon'?
meaning_mcq.answer: reckless freedom from inhibition

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abandoned'?
meaning_mcq.answer: forsaken, left behind

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'aberrant'?
options: markedly different from an accepted norm
meaning_mcq.answer: markedly different from an accepted norm

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'aberration'?
options: a deviation from what is normal
meaning_mcq.answer: a deviation from what is normal

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'ability'?
options: the quality of being able to perform
meaning_mcq.answer: the quality of being able to perform

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abjure'?
meaning_mcq.answer: formally reject or give up

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'able'?
options: having the necessary means or skill
meaning_mcq.answer: having the necessary means or skill

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'about'?
meaning_mcq.answer: on the move

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'above'?
options: an earlier section of a written text
meaning_mcq.answer: an earlier section of a written text

sentence_fill.question: I always wake up early at 6:00 ______.
He played the drums with complete ______, not caring who was listening.
The old house at the end of the street has been ______ for years.
His sudden outburst was completely ______ from his usual calm behavior.
The sudden snowstorm in July was a weather ______.
She has an incredible ______ to solve complex puzzles quickly.
Under threat of torture, Galileo ______ the heliocentric theory.
Are you ______ to finish this report by Friday?
The toddler was ______ the house, exploring every room.
As mentioned ______ in the document, you must sign the form.

words.meaning_en: open and honest
words.example_en: The transaction was completely aboveboard, with no hidden fees.
words.example_ta: பரிவர்த்தனை எந்த மறைமுக கட்டணமும் இன்றி முற்றிலும் வெளிப்படையாக இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: in a foreign country
words.example_en: She decided to study abroad for a semester to learn a new language.
words.example_ta: புதிய மொழியைக் கற்க அவள் ஒரு செமஸ்டர் வெளிநாட்டில் படிக்க முடிவு செய்தாள்.

words.meaning_en: revoke or relinquish formally; do away with
words.example_en: The government chose to abrogate the old treaty.
words.example_ta: பழைய ஒப்பந்தத்தை ரத்து செய்ய அரசாங்கம் முடிவு செய்தது.

words.meaning_en: the state of being absent
words.example_en: His absence from the meeting was noted by the manager.
words.example_ta: கூட்டத்தில் அவர் இல்லாததை மேலாளர் கவனித்தார்.

words.meaning_en: go away or leave
words.example_en: He absented himself from the crowded party to get some fresh air.
words.example_ta: சுத்தமான காற்றைப் பெற கூட்டமான பார்ட்டியிலிருந்து அவன் விலகிச் சென்றான்.

words.meaning_en: something that is not relative; complete and beyond human control
words.example_en: The king ruled with absolute power over the kingdom.
words.example_ta: அரசன் ராஜ்யத்தின் மீது முழுமையான அதிகாரத்துடன் ஆட்சி செய்தான்.

words.meaning_en: completely and without qualification
words.example_en: I am absolutely certain that I locked the door.
words.example_ta: நான் கதவைப் பூட்டியதில் முற்றிலும் உறுதியாக இருக்கிறேன்.

words.meaning_en: become imbued; to take in
words.example_en: A dry sponge will easily absorb the spilled water.
words.example_ta: ஒரு காய்ந்த ஸ்பாஞ்ச் கொட்டிய தண்ணீரை எளிதில் உறிஞ்சிவிடும்.

words.meaning_en: choose not to consume or take part in
words.example_en: She decided to abstain from eating junk food.
words.example_ta: ஆரோக்கியமற்ற உணவுகளை சாப்பிடுவதை தவிர்க்க அவள் முடிவு செய்தாள்.

words.meaning_en: difficult to understand; incomprehensible
words.example_en: The professor's lecture on quantum mechanics was too abstruse for the freshmen.
words.example_ta: குவாண்டம் மெக்கானிக்ஸ் பற்றிய பேராசிரியரின் விரிவுரை புதிய மாணவர்களுக்கு புரிந்துகொள்ள மிகவும் கடினமாக இருந்தது.

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'aboveboard'?
meaning_mcq.answer: open and honest

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abroad'?
meaning_mcq.answer: in a foreign country

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abrogate'?
meaning_mcq.answer: revoke or relinquish formally

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'absence'?
meaning_mcq.answer: the state of being absent

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'absent'?
meaning_mcq.answer: go away or leave

options: something complete and beyond human control
meaning_mcq.answer: something complete and beyond human control

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'absolutely'?
meaning_mcq.answer: completely and without qualification

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'absorb'?
meaning_mcq.answer: become imbued; to take in

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abstain'?
options: choose not to consume or take part in
meaning_mcq.answer: choose not to consume or take part in

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abstruse'?
meaning_mcq.answer: difficult to understand; incomprehensible

words.meaning_en: cruel or inhumane treatment
words.example_en: The child showed signs of physical abuse.
words.example_ta: குழந்தைக்கு உடல் ரீதியான துஷ்பிரயோகத்தின் அறிகுறிகள் காணப்பட்டன.

words.meaning_en: extremely bad
words.example_en: The team's performance this season was truly abysmal.
words.example_ta: இந்த சீசனில் அணியின் செயல்பாடு உண்மையிலேயே மிகவும் மோசமாக இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: an educator who works at a college or university
words.example_en: The academic published several papers on history.
words.example_ta: அந்த கல்வியாளர் வரலாறு குறித்து பல கட்டுரைகளை வெளியிட்டார்.

words.meaning_en: distinctive manner of oral expression
words.example_en: He spoke English with a strong French accent.
words.example_ta: அவர் வலுவான பிரெஞ்சு உச்சரிப்புடன் ஆங்கிலம் பேசினார்.

words.meaning_en: consider or hold as true; to receive willingly
words.example_en: She decided to accept the job offer.
words.example_ta: வேலை வாய்ப்பை ஏற்க அவள் முடிவு செய்தாள்.

words.meaning_en: worthy of acceptance or satisfactory
words.example_en: The radiation was at an acceptable level.
words.example_ta: கதிர்வீச்சு ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளக்கூடிய அளவில் இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: the right to enter
words.example_en: Only employees have access to this building.
words.example_ta: ஊழியர்களுக்கு மட்டுமே இந்த கட்டிடத்தை அணுக உரிமை உள்ளது.

words.meaning_en: an unfortunate mishap; especially one causing damage or injury
words.example_en: He broke his leg in a car accident.
words.example_ta: கார் விபத்தில் அவனது கால் உடைந்தது.

words.meaning_en: happening by chance, unintentionally, or unexpectedly
words.example_en: We had an accidental meeting at the coffee shop.
words.example_ta: காபி கடையில் எங்களுக்கு ஒரு தற்செயலான சந்திப்பு ஏற்பட்டது.

words.meaning_en: without advance planning; by chance
words.example_en: I accidentally deleted the important file.
words.example_ta: நான் தற்செயலாக முக்கியமான கோப்பை அழித்துவிட்டேன்.

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abuse'?
meaning_mcq.answer: cruel or inhumane treatment

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'abysmal'?
meaning_mcq.answer: extremely bad

options: an educator who works at a college or university
meaning_mcq.answer: an educator who works at a college or university

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accent'?
meaning_mcq.answer: distinctive manner of oral expression

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accept'?
options: consider or hold as true; receive willingly
meaning_mcq.answer: consider or hold as true; receive willingly

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acceptable'?
meaning_mcq.answer: worthy of acceptance or satisfactory

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'access'?
meaning_mcq.answer: the right to enter

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accident'?
options: an unfortunate mishap; especially one causing damage or injury
meaning_mcq.answer: an unfortunate mishap; especially one causing damage or injury

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accidental'?
meaning_mcq.answer: happening by chance, unintentionally

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accidentally'?
meaning_mcq.answer: without advance planning; by chance

words.meaning_en: an award or praise granted as a special honor
words.example_en: She received the highest accolade of her career—a golden trophy.
words.example_ta: அவள் தனது தொழில் வாழ்க்கையின் மிக உயர்ந்த விருதான தங்கக் கோப்பையைப் பெற்றாள்.

words.meaning_en: making or becoming suitable; adjusting to circumstances
words.example_en: They reached an accommodation regarding the new work schedule.
words.example_ta: புதிய வேலை அட்டவணை குறித்து அவர்கள் ஒரு இணக்கப்பாட்டை எட்டினர்.

words.meaning_en: be present or associated with an event or entity
words.example_en: I will accompany you to the doctor's appointment.
words.example_ta: நான் மருத்துவரை காண உன்னுடன் வருவேன்.

words.meaning_en: go together; harmonize
words.example_en: Everything went according to our plan.
words.example_ta: எல்லாம் எங்கள் திட்டப்படி நடந்தது.

words.meaning_en: a record or narrative description of past events
words.example_en: She gave a detailed account of her travels.
words.example_ta: அவள் தனது பயணங்களைப் பற்றிய விரிவான விளக்கத்தை அளித்தாள்.

words.meaning_en: conforming exactly or almost exactly to fact or standard
words.example_en: The clock provides a very accurate measurement of time.
words.example_ta: கடிகாரம் நேரத்தை மிகவும் துல்லியமாக அளவிடுகிறது.

words.meaning_en: with few mistakes; correctly
words.example_en: He aimed and accurately hit the target.
words.example_ta: அவன் குறிபார்த்து இலக்கை துல்லியமாக அடித்தான்.

words.meaning_en: bring an accusation against; level a charge against
words.example_en: They accuse him of stealing the money.
words.example_ta: அவர் பணத்தை திருடியதாக அவர்கள் குற்றம் சாட்டுகிறார்கள்.

words.meaning_en: harsh in tone; tasting sour or bitter
words.example_en: The critic's review of the movie was extremely acerbic.
words.example_ta: திரைப்படம் குறித்த விமர்சகரின் விமர்சனம் மிகவும் கடுமையாக இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: to gain with effort
words.example_en: She worked hard to achieve her goals.
words.example_ta: அவள் தனது இலக்குகளை அடைய கடினமாக உழைத்தாள்.

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accolade'?
options: an award or praise granted as a special honor
meaning_mcq.answer: an award or praise granted as a special honor

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accommodation'?

meaning_mcq.answer: making or becoming suitable; adjusting to circumstances

meaning_mcq.answer: be present or associated with an event or entity

meaning_mcq.answer: go together; harmonize

options: a record or narrative description of past events
meaning_mcq.answer: a record or narrative description of past events

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accurate'?
options: conforming exactly or almost exactly to fact or standard
meaning_mcq.answer: conforming exactly or almost exactly to fact or standard

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accurately'?
meaning_mcq.answer: with few mistakes; correctly

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'accuse'?
options: bring an accusation against; level a charge against
meaning_mcq.answer: bring an accusation against; level a charge against

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acerbic'?
options: harsh in tone; tasting sour or bitter
meaning_mcq.answer: harsh in tone; tasting sour or bitter

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'achieve'?
meaning_mcq.answer: to gain with effort

words.meaning_en: the action of accomplishing something successfully
words.example_en: Winning the championship was a monumental achievement.
words.example_ta: சாம்பியன் பட்டத்தை வென்றது ஒரு மாபெரும் சாதனையாகும்.

words.meaning_en: a sour water-soluble compound that reacts with a base
words.example_en: Lemon juice contains citric acid.
words.example_ta: எலுமிச்சை சாற்றில் சிட்ரிக் அமிலம் உள்ளது.

words.meaning_en: declare to be true or admit the existence or reality of
words.example_en: He refused to acknowledge his mistake.
words.example_ta: அவர் தனது தவற்றை ஒப்புக்கொள்ள மறுத்துவிட்டார்.

words.meaning_en: the highest point of achievement or excellence
words.example_en: His performance was the acme of his acting career.
words.example_ta: அவரது நடிப்பு அவரது நடிப்பு வாழ்க்கையின் உச்சமாக இருந்தது.

words.meaning_en: come into the possession of something; to get or gain
words.example_en: She managed to acquire a rare painting for her collection.
words.example_ta: அவள் தனது சேகரிப்புக்காக ஒரு அரிய ஓவியத்தைப் பெற முடிந்தது.

words.meaning_en: bitterness and ill will in speech or behavior
words.example_en: The dispute was settled without any acrimony.
words.example_ta: எந்தவித கசப்புணர்வும் இன்றி தகராறு தீர்க்கப்பட்டது.

words.meaning_en: to the opposite side
words.example_en: We swam across the river safely.
words.example_ta: நாங்கள் ஆற்றின் குறுக்கே பாதுகாப்பாக நீந்தினோம்.

words.meaning_en: a legal document from a legislative body; or a deed done
words.example_en: The new environmental act was passed by parliament.
words.example_ta: புதிய சுற்றுச்சூழல் சட்டம் பாராளுமன்றத்தால் நிறைவேற்றப்பட்டது.

words.meaning_en: something done; the process of doing something
words.example_en: The manager demanded immediate action to fix the problem.
words.example_ta: பிரச்சனையை சரிசெய்ய உடனடி நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க மேலாளர் கோரினார்.

words.meaning_en: a chemical agent capable of activity
words.example_en: The lotion contains a powerful active to soothe the skin.
words.example_ta: லோஷனில் சருமத்தை ஆற்றும் சக்திவாய்ந்த செயல்படும் பொருள் உள்ளது.

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'achievement'?
options: the action of accomplishing something successfully
meaning_mcq.answer: the action of accomplishing something successfully

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acid'?
options: a sour water-soluble compound that reacts with a base
meaning_mcq.answer: a sour water-soluble compound that reacts with a base

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acknowledge'?
options: declare to be true or admit the existence of
meaning_mcq.answer: declare to be true or admit the existence of

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acme'?
options: the highest point of achievement or excellence
meaning_mcq.answer: the highest point of achievement or excellence

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acquire'?
options: come into the possession of something; to get or gain
meaning_mcq.answer: come into the possession of something; to get or gain

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'acrimony'?
options: bitterness and ill will in speech or behavior
meaning_mcq.answer: bitterness and ill will in speech or behavior

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'across'?
meaning_mcq.answer: to the opposite side

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'act' (as a noun)?
options: a legal document from a legislative body; or a deed done
meaning_mcq.answer: a legal document from a legislative body; or a deed done

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'action'?
options: something done; the process of doing something
meaning_mcq.answer: something done; the process of doing something

meaning_mcq.question: What is the meaning of 'active' (as a noun)?
options: a chemical agent capable of activity
meaning_mcq.answer: a chemical agent capable of activity
